scripts.test: node scripts/rebuild-native.mjs --target node && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:sidecar: cd sidecar && uv run --group dev pytest tests
scripts.test:sidecar:server: cd sidecar && uv run --group dev pytest tests/test_server.py
scripts.test:sidecar:contracts: cd sidecar && uv run --group dev pytest tests/test_contracts.py
scripts.test:sidecar:merge: cd sidecar && uv run --group dev pytest tests/test_merge.py
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @quantdesk/main run build:e2e && node scripts/rebuild-native.mjs --target electron && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:fund-sync: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @quantdesk/main run build:e2e && node scripts/rebuild-native.mjs --target electron && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts packages/main/e2e/fund-history-sync.e2e.test.ts
scripts.package:spike: node scripts/prepare-sidecar-package.mjs && node scripts/rebuild-native.mjs --target electron && pnpm run build && node scripts/prepare-electron-runtime.mjs && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish never --mac dmg
